title: Challenges in Cloud Computing as a Green Technology
description: A flowchart illustrating the primary challenges that prevent cloud computing from being a fully green technology, categorized by their source and showing their interconnected nature.
relationships: Technical challenges like 'Data Center Energy Inefficiency' and 'Resource Allocation' contribute to the 'Rebound Effect'. The 'Rebound Effect' and continuous 'Hardware Refresh Cycles' are driven by economic factors, which in turn create 'E-Waste' and are dependent on the 'Energy Source & Carbon Intensity' of the grid. All elements are interconnected, showing that a challenge in one area often exacerbates a challenge in another.
